summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Platform Settings APIs and Integrations Page. All 18 backend API tests pass (100%). Frontend pages load correctly with all features working.
seed_data_creation: Test API keys created during testing are cleaned up via delete endpoint
context_for_next_testing_agent: Platform Settings and Integrations pages are fully functional. All backend APIs for settings management and API keys are working correctly.

PlatformSettingsPage.account_settings_tab: PASSED - Shows user profile, email, phone, language, profile picture, change password option
PlatformSettingsPage.general_settings_tab: PASSED - Platform name (AR/EN), browser title, language, date format, timezone, notifications toggles, AI features, registration status, maintenance mode, system info
PlatformSettingsPage.brand_identity_tab: PASSED - Logo upload, favicon upload, color pickers (primary, secondary, accent)
PlatformSettingsPage.contact_info_tab: PASSED - Primary email, support email, phones, address, working hours, website, owner name, social media links
PlatformSettingsPage.terms_conditions_tab: PASSED - Terms content editor with version management
PlatformSettingsPage.privacy_policy_tab: PASSED - Privacy content editor with version management
PlatformSettingsPage.security_sessions_tab: PASSED - Active sessions list, 2FA toggle, session timeout, max sessions, password policy settings

IntegrationsPage.integrations_tab: PASSED - Shows 7 integration cards with stats (7 total, 5 active, 1 pending, 1 error)
IntegrationsPage.category_filters: PASSED - All, Government, Payments, Messaging, SMS, Email, Storage, AI, Other
IntegrationsPage.integration_cards: PASSED - نظام نور, واتساب, بوابة الدفع, بوابة الرسائل, Amazon S3, SendGrid, الذكاء الاصطناعي
IntegrationsPage.card_actions: PASSED - Toggle, test connection, setup, view logs, sync buttons present
IntegrationsPage.api_management_tab: PASSED - Shows API keys (Production, Testing) with key/secret display
IntegrationsPage.api_endpoints: PASSED - Lists available endpoints (students, teachers, schools, attendance)
IntegrationsPage.create_key_button: PASSED - Present for generating new API keys

api_keys: POST /api/settings/api-keys - PASSED (creates new API key with secret)
GET /api/settings/api-keys - PASSED (lists all API keys without secrets)

GET /api/settings/platform.structure: Returns general, brand, contact, terms, privacy, security, updated_at

POST /api/settings/api-keys.key_format: nsk_live_xxx or nsk_test_xxx based on permissions
POST /api/settings/api-keys.security: Secret hash stored, not returned in GET requests
